info.title: Important, Please Read!
info.desc: You are about to create a quantum resistant wallet. Do not send Ethereum or other coins or tokens to this wallet address!

info.title: Passwords
info.desc: Make sure that you use a strong, long password and do not forget it!

info.title: Backups
info.desc: Backup your wallet and keep it safe offline. Keep at least three copies of your wallets in different places offline.

info.title: Wallet Safety
info.desc: Do not share your wallet or passwords with anyone. Scammers often offer to help but will steal your wallet!

info.title: Email Safety
info.desc: Do not reply to or open attachments, links or images in emails that talks about Quantum Coin, tokens or wallets. They are most likely scams that can result in your coins and tokens getting stolen!

info.title: Social Media and Messaging Apps Safety
info.desc: Do not respond to social media and messaging app direct-messages from community members or anyone in general talking about Quantum Coin. They are most likely scammers who can trick you and steal your coins or tokens!

quizWrongAnswer: Your answer is wrong! Please read the question carefully and try again.

quiz.title: Coin Type
quiz.question: What coins or tokens can you send to this wallet?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. You should be send only Quantum Coins to this wallet.

quiz.title: Lost wallet or password
quiz.question: If you lost your wallet or password, who can help recover?
quiz.afterQuizInfo: This is correct. No one can help you recover your wallet or password.

langValues.title: Quantum Coin (Q)
langValues.use-strong-password: Use a strong and long password. And do not forget it!
langValues.restore-wallet-from-seed: Restore A Quantum Wallet From Seed Words
langValues.seed-words-info-1: 1. Ensure that no one is looking at the screen other than you.
langValues.seed-words-info-2: 2. Ensure that there is no camera pointed at this screen, including from your phone.
langValues.seed-words-info-3: 3. You should save the seed words safely offline and keep multiple copies in a trustworthy and safe location.
langValues.seed-words-info-4: 4. If these seed words are stolen or someone else gets access to them, your wallet is compromised.
langValues.seed-words-show: 5. Click here to reveal the seed words.
langValues.waitWalletSave: Please wait while your wallet is being saved with strong encryption. This can take upto a minute or so to complete...
langValues.waitWalletOpen: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and opened. This can take upto a minute...
langValues.waitUnlock: Please wait while your wallet is being decrypted and unlocked. This can take upto a minute.
langValues.strongbox-degraded-banner: Wallet integrity check recovered from a backup slot. Please create a fresh backup soon.
langValues.name: Name
langValues.no-active-network: There is no active network. Add and select a network from Settings.
langValues.send-only: Send only Quantum coins to this address!
langValues.no-more-transactions: There are no more transactions to show.
langValues.select-seed-word-length: How many seed words do you have?
langValues.confirm-wallet-description: Check your wallet address. If this is not the correct address, you may press back to review and edit the seed words.
langValues.skip-verify-confirm: Are you sure you want to skip verification? It is recommended that you verify.
langValues.advanced-signing-description: Applicable wallets will incur 30 times higher gas price if this setting is enabled
langValues.backup-prompt: Do you want to allow wallets to be backed up as part of phone backups?
langValues.backup-description: When enabled, encrypted wallet data will be included in iCloud Backup and unencrypted Finder backups, so you can restore on a new device using your password. When disabled, the wallet file is excluded from these backups; note that ENCRYPTED Finder/iTunes backups still include all app data due to platform behavior. This setting does not affect wallet files you explicitly export or save to iCloud Drive.
langValues.backup-encrypted-warning: Important: choosing "No" excludes the wallet file from iCloud Backup and unencrypted Finder backups, but ENCRYPTED Finder/iTunes backups always include all app data. The wallet file remains encrypted with your password regardless of this setting.
langValues.seed-accessibility-summary: Seed phrase is displayed on screen. Use the Copy button to copy it.
langValues.seed-hidden-for-capture: Seed phrase hidden because the screen is being recorded or mirrored. Stop screen recording or mirroring to view the seed.
langValues.address-checksum-warning: This address does not match its expected checksum form. Double-check that the address is correct before sending.
langValues.backup-submitted-cloud-message: Your wallet has been written to [FOLDER]/[FILENAME] and submitted to iCloud for upload. iCloud uploads finish in the background and may take time depending on your network. The backup is NOT yet fully durable in the cloud — keep this device powered on and connected until iCloud finishes the upload. You can check upload status in the Files app.
langValues.restore-decrypt-failed: Unable to decrypt. Enter a different password or skip this file.
langValues.restore-no-backups-found: No backup files were found in the selected folder.
langValues.restore-try-different-password: Unable to decrypt any wallet with that password. Try with a different password.
langValues.restore-partial-progress: [COUNT] wallet(s) were restored. Enter password for the remaining.
langValues.camera-permission-denied: Camera access has been blocked. Open Settings and grant the Camera permission to scan QR codes.
langValues.cloud-backup-info: Pick a folder in iCloud Drive (or any cloud-synced folder) to use for wallet backups. Tap Open after selecting the folder; future backups will be saved there automatically. iCloud Drive is available from the picker sidebar.
langValues.backup-options-description: Save an encrypted backup now. You can save to cloud and to a file (you can do both, one after the other). Tap Done when you're finished.
langValues.wallet-already-exists-detailed:
The wallet with following address already exists:
[ADDRESS]
langValues.tamper-jailbreak-message: This device shows signs of jailbreak. The OS-level isolation that protects your wallet is bypassed - apps you trust can be modified by other apps you have installed. Continue at your own risk, or quit?
langValues.tamper-debugger-message: A debugger is attached to this app. We strongly recommend you exit. If you understand the risk, you can ignore this warning and continue.
langValues.tamper-runtime-message: This wallet's signing module has been modified. We strongly recommend you exit and reinstall from the App Store. If you understand the risk, you can ignore this warning and continue.
langValues.review-transaction-prompt: Please review your transaction request to be sent:
langValues.must-agree-to-submit: You have to agree to submit the transaction.
langValues.submitting-transaction: Please wait while your transaction is being submitted.
langValues.transaction-sent: Your transaction request has been sent.
langValues.transaction-message-exits: A transaction request is already in progress.

errors.passwordSpec: Enter a minimum of 12 characters for password
errors.passwordSpace: Password cannot start or end with spaces
errors.walletPasswordMismatch: The password does not match what you entered earlier.
errors.enterAmount: Please enter the amount to send correctly.
